prompts.name: Preserve Core Prompt
prompts.text: Preserve the user's main subject, setting, and intent while improving clarity, detail, lighting, and coherence.

prompts.name: Remove Conflicts
prompts.text: Avoid contradictory instructions such as bright daylight and dark night together unless the contrast is intentional.

prompts.name: Prioritize Subject
prompts.text: Keep the main subject as the clear visual focus, with background and props supporting rather than competing.

prompts.name: Clean Prompt Flow
prompts.text: Organize the image idea into subject, action, environment, lighting, mood, style, and finishing detail.

prompts.name: Reduce Tag Spam
prompts.text: Avoid unnecessary repeated tags; use clear descriptive phrasing that works across multiple image models.

prompts.name: Fix Lighting Bias
prompts.text: If the image becomes too dark, replace vague cinematic lighting with specific readable lighting and balanced exposure.

prompts.name: Simplify Scene
prompts.text: Simplify the scene by removing unnecessary props, extra characters, and competing background details.

prompts.name: Strengthen Materials
prompts.text: Clarify fabric, metal, glass, leather, skin, hair, and environmental materials with realistic surface behavior.

prompts.name: Strengthen Pose
prompts.text: Clarify pose, weight distribution, hand placement, body direction, and readable silhouette.

prompts.name: Strengthen Mood
prompts.text: Clarify the emotional tone through expression, color, lighting, environment, and pose.

prompts.name: Fix Background
prompts.text: Make the background specific, readable, and supportive instead of vague, empty, or overly dark.

prompts.name: Fix Anatomy
prompts.text: Prioritize natural proportions, clean joints, correct hands, readable face, and believable body alignment.

prompts.name: Model Neutral Rewrite
prompts.text: Use plain descriptive language that works for anime, semi-realistic, realistic, SDXL, Flux, Lumina, and Qwen-style models.

prompts.name: Keep Concise
prompts.text: Keep the prompt concise enough to remain focused while still giving strong subject, setting, lighting, and quality guidance.

prompts.name: Final Check
prompts.text: Ensure the prompt has no obvious contradictions, no missing subject, no vague background, and no unwanted text instruction.
